skeptic.top_risk: The two load-bearing tuning claims and reward-dilution are both unproven — idea admits (b) is unmeasured, (a) rests on anecdotal ~24-message baseline.
skeptic.cheapest_evidence: Replay/simulate real channel message logs across traffic tiers against candidate parameter sets before writing spawn/claim code.
skeptic.report: Passive engagement engine; real claim is a tuning claim. Failure: fixed 24-count threshold behaves oppositely across tiers; farming economics unmodeled; reward dilution self-flagged. Cheapest evidence: offline log replay, earn-rate envelope, shadow launch. Cost moderated by reuse. Smallest slice: measurement-first shadow mode. HOLD over BUILD (both claims unmeasured); not KILL (reuse design sound, failures cheaply measurable).

builder.top_risk: Reward inflation vs fishing/mining is un-measured — no earn-rate baseline exists, so reusing that pool could undercut those games.
builder.cheapest_evidence: Tuning/anti-farm sim already committed and passing (946 self-checks); missing piece is logging fishing+mining earn-per-active-user-per-day alongside encounter mint.
builder.report: Thin orchestration cog over existing seams, no new currency. Claim (a) settled by committed deterministic sim: defaults 24/30s/900s, spawn ceiling 5.22/hr, farm cap 4/hr. Claim (b) unmeasurable pre-launch. Secondary reflex-claim bot; guarantee server-side cooldown + atomic exactly-once claim. Cost low-moderate via reuse. Smallest slice: off-by-default opt-in pilot at defaults, provisional reward values, telemetry incl fishing/mining baseline.

user_value.top_risk: The parameter set and reward-pool draw are both asserted not measured — either could make encounters spammy/invisible or quietly undercut fishing/mining earn rates.
user_value.cheapest_evidence: Shadow-run the debounced counter + reward draws in log-only mode across a few real channels for a week and compare cadence and payout against fishing/mining baselines.
user_value.report: Passive engagement feature reusing existing infra. Failure: economy-integrity, mistuned params inflate shared state, devaluing fishing/mining; ~24 threshold anecdotal. Cheapest evidence: log-only shadow run; who-wants-this not measured. Cost low but tuning/economy risk expensive, retirable via measurement. Smallest slice: log-only shadow, then real spawns in few opt-in channels, instrumented. BUILD as shadow/opt-in slice not server-wide.

synthesizer.top_risk: Both load-bearing claims are model-or-anecdote backed, not live-measured: (a) rarity/anti-farm rests on a synthetic sim never validated against real channel logs, and (b) reward dilution vs fishing/mining has no earn-rate baseline at all.
synthesizer.cheapest_evidence: Log-only shadow run: replay/observe the debounced counter + reward draws across low/med/high-traffic real channels for ~1 week, comparing spawn cadence and paced-spam EV to sim predictions and mint-per-active-user to fishing/mining earn baselines.
synthesizer.report: Panel synthesis (3 probes: 1 HOLD, 2 BUILD; reconciled to gated BUILD). Core claim: thin orchestration cog reusing existing seams, no new currency; real claim is the two tuning claims. Strongest failure: economy/tuning integrity, not engineering; fixed ~24 threshold behaves oppositely across tiers; disagreement weighed — builder treats (a) as settled by committed deterministic sim (24/30s/900s, ceiling 5.22/hr, farm cap 4/hr, 946 self-checks), skeptic/user_value treat as anecdotal; reconciliation: model-proven not traffic-proven; (b) unanimously not measured; secondary reflex-claim bots mitigated by server-side cooldown + atomic claim. Cheapest evidence: offline log replay + log-only shadow; missing instrument is fishing/mining earn baseline. Cost low-moderate via reuse; complexity in atomic claim, cooldown, opt-in; who-wants-this not measured. Smallest slice: NOT server-wide — log-only shadow then off-by-default allow-listed opt-in pilot at sim defaults, provisional rewards, full telemetry; both gaps gate GA. BUILD over HOLD because all three converge on same first action (measure via shadow/opt-in); confidence held 0.63.
